Vault.doc: represents a MIPS vault singleton coin with its lineage proof and configuration info.

child.doc: computes the expected child vault after a spend with the given custody hash and amount.

VaultInfo.doc: holds the launcher ID and current custody hash that define a MIPS vault's identity and access control.

MemberConfig.doc: configures a MIPS vault member with its signing nonce, top-level status, and spending restrictions.

new.doc: creates a default MemberConfig with top_level false, nonce 0, and no restrictions.

with_top_level.doc: returns a copy of this config with the top-level flag set (true if this member is the root signer).

with_nonce.doc: returns a copy of this config with the given nonce, used to differentiate members with the same key.

with_restrictions.doc: returns a copy of this config with the given spending restrictions applied to the member.

m_of_n_hash.doc: computes the custody hash for an M-of-N multisig configuration.

k1_member_hash.doc: computes the custody hash for a secp256k1 member, used for Bitcoin-compatible vault signing.

r1_member_hash.doc: computes the custody hash for a secp256r1 (P-256) member, used for passkey-compatible vault signing.

bls_member_hash.doc: computes the custody hash for a BLS member, used for standard Chia key vault signing.

passkey_member_hash.doc: computes the custody hash for a passkey (WebAuthn) member, used for browser-based vault authentication.

singleton_member_hash.doc: computes the custody hash for a singleton member, allowing another singleton to authorize vault spends.

fixed_member_hash.doc: computes the custody hash for a fixed-puzzle member that always runs a specific puzzle.

custom_member_hash.doc: computes the custody hash for a custom member with an arbitrary inner puzzle hash.

Restriction.doc: represents a spending restriction applied to a MIPS vault member, constraining what actions the member can authorize.

RestrictionKind.doc: specifies the type of MIPS vault restriction: validating member conditions, restricting delegated puzzle hashes, or wrapping delegated puzzles.

timelock_restriction.doc: creates a restriction that enforces a minimum timelock (in seconds) before the member can authorize a spend.

force_1_of_2_restriction.doc: creates a restriction that forces a 1-of-2 structure, used for vault recovery where one side can override the other.

prevent_condition_opcode_restriction.doc: creates a restriction that prevents the member from emitting conditions with the given opcode.

prevent_multiple_create_coins_restrictio.doc: creates a restriction that prevents the member from creating more than one output coin per spend.

prevent_vault_side_effects_restriction.doc: creates a set of restrictions that prevent common vault side effects like announcements and multiple create coins.

MipsSpend.doc: builds the spend reveal for a MIPS vault by composing member proofs, M-of-N paths, and restriction layers.

spend.doc: finalizes the MIPS spend and returns a Spend (puzzle reveal + solution) for the given custody hash.

spend_vault.doc: applies this MIPS spend to a vault coin, producing the coin spend for inclusion in a transaction.

m_of_n.doc: adds an M-of-N multisig layer to the spend, specifying which branch of the Merkle tree is being revealed.

k1_member.doc: adds a secp256k1 member signature to the spend for Bitcoin-compatible vault authorization.

r1_member.doc: adds a secp256r1 (P-256) member signature to the spend.

bls_member.doc: adds a BLS member to the spend (the BLS signature is aggregated separately into the spend bundle).

passkey_member.doc: adds a passkey (WebAuthn) member to the spend with the authenticator data and client JSON from the browser.

singleton_member.doc: adds a singleton member to the spend, proving that the authorizing singleton exists at the given state.

fixed_puzzle_member.doc: adds a fixed-puzzle member to the spend that always runs the same predetermined puzzle.

custom_member.doc: adds a custom member to the spend with an arbitrary puzzle reveal and solution.

timelock.doc: applies a timelock restriction to the spend, asserting the required seconds have elapsed.

force_1_of_2_restricted_variable.doc: applies the force-1-of-2 restriction for vault recovery, replacing the right-side member hash.

prevent_condition_opcode.doc: applies a restriction that prevents emitting conditions with the given opcode.

prevent_multiple_create_coins.doc: applies a restriction that prevents creating more than one output coin.

prevent_vault_side_effects.doc: applies all standard vault side-effect prevention restrictions.

VaultMint.doc: holds the result of minting a new MIPS vault, including the vault singleton and any parent conditions needed.

wrapped_delegated_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the puzzle hash of a delegated puzzle after wrapping it with the given restrictions.

MipsMemo.doc: represents a MIPS vault memo attached to coin hints, encoding the vault's inner puzzle structure for wallet discovery.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash from this memo, used to verify vault coin puzzle hashes.

InnerPuzzleMemo.doc: encodes a MIPS vault member or M-of-N structure as a memo, including nonce and restriction info.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash from this memo structure with the given top-level flag.

RestrictionMemo.doc: encodes a MIPS vault restriction as a memo for wallet discovery and puzzle hash reconstruction.

force_1_of_2_restricted_variable.doc: creates a restriction memo for the force-1-of-2 recovery restriction.

enforce_delegated_puzzle_wrappers.doc: creates a restriction memo that enforces a list of delegated puzzle wrappers.

timelock.doc: creates a restriction memo for a timelock restriction with the given duration in seconds.

WrapperMemo.doc: encodes a delegated puzzle wrapper restriction as a memo for MIPS vault discovery.

prevent_vault_side_effects.doc: creates wrapper memos for all standard vault side-effect prevention wrappers.

force_coin_announcement.doc: creates a wrapper memo that forces a coin announcement in every vault spend.

force_coin_message.doc: creates a wrapper memo that forces a coin message (CHIP-0025) in every vault spend.

prevent_multiple_create_coins.doc: creates a wrapper memo that prevents creating more than one output coin.

timelock.doc: creates a wrapper memo that enforces a minimum timelock in seconds.

prevent_condition_opcode.doc: creates a wrapper memo that prevents emitting conditions with the given opcode.

Force1of2RestrictedVariableMemo.doc: holds the parameters for a force-1-of-2 restriction memo used in MIPS vault recovery configuration.

MemoKind.doc: represents the kind of MIPS vault inner puzzle memo: either a single member or an M-of-N multisig.

member.doc: creates a MemoKind for a single vault member.

m_of_n.doc: creates a MemoKind for an M-of-N multisig structure.

as_member.doc: returns the member memo if this is a single member kind, or nil otherwise.

as_m_of_n.doc: returns the M-of-N memo if this is a multisig kind, or nil otherwise.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash from this memo kind.

MemberMemo.doc: encodes a single MIPS vault member as a memo, including the member puzzle hash and key/config data.

k1.doc: creates a member memo for a secp256k1 (Bitcoin-compatible) signer.

r1.doc: creates a member memo for a secp256r1 (P-256) signer.

bls.doc: creates a member memo for a BLS (standard Chia) signer.

passkey.doc: creates a member memo for a passkey (WebAuthn) signer.

singleton.doc: creates a member memo for a singleton-based signer identified by its launcher ID.

fixed_puzzle.doc: creates a member memo for a fixed-puzzle signer that always runs the same puzzle.

MofNMemo.doc: encodes an M-of-N multisig structure as a memo, listing the required threshold and all member sub-memos.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the M-of-N inner puzzle hash from the required threshold and member hashes.

MipsMemoContext.doc: accumulates known keys, timelocks, and opcodes to help parse and reconstruct MIPS vault memos from on-chain hints.

new.doc: creates an empty MIPS memo parsing context.

add_k1.doc: registers a known secp256k1 public key for memo parsing.

add_r1.doc: registers a known secp256r1 public key for memo parsing.

add_bls.doc: registers a known BLS public key for memo parsing.

add_hash.doc: registers a known puzzle hash for memo parsing.

add_timelock.doc: registers a known timelock duration (in seconds) for memo parsing.

add_opcode.doc: registers a known condition opcode for memo parsing.

add_singleton_mode.doc: registers a known singleton mode byte for memo parsing.
